title: Contact Canadian Biosafety Standards and Guidelines - Canada.ca
content:
## Contact Canadian Biosafety Standards and Guidelines
Contact us with questions about the:
- Canadian Biosafety Standard
- Canadian Biosafety Handbook
- Canadian Biosafety Guidelines
- development of future editions
The Public Health Agency of Canada 100 Colonnade Road Ottawa, ON K1A 0K9
Email: pathogens.pathogenes@phac-aspc.gc.ca Phone: 613-957-1779
We aim to respond to emails sent to pathogens.pathogenes@phac-aspc.gc.ca within 2 business days. If we can't answer your question right away, we will acknowledge receipt.
The Canadian Food Inspection Agency 1400 Merivale Road Ottawa, ON K1A 0Y9
Email: standardsnormes@inspection.gc.ca Phone: 613-773-6520 Fax: 613-773-6521
